1070601.name: Instinctive Read
1070601.desc: When attacking a target with a damage type the target is "Fatal" (Resistance>x1.5) to, inflict +1 more [Burst] with Skill effects

1070611.name: Instinctive Read
1070611.desc:
When attacking a target with a damage type the target is "Fatal" (Resistance>x1.5) to, inflict +1 more [Burst] with Skill effects
If 4 or more surviving units, including this unit, are Seven Association Fixers, additional +1 more [Burst]

1070631.name: Connect The Dots

1 ally with the highest Max HP inflicts +1 more [Burst] with Skill effects when attacking a target with a damage type that the target is "Fatal"(Resistance>x1.5) to
